title: Bitcoin 2026 Conference — Las Vegas (Day 1)
desc: Opening day at The Venetian. Historically a catalyst for volatility. Focus shifts to sovereign adoption rumors and major institutional product launches. Watch for the 'Keynote Surprise' at 10:00 AM PST.

title: FOMC Decision — Powell's Swan Song
desc: Jerome Powell’s final interest rate decision before handing the gavel to Kevin Warsh. While rates are expected to hold, the market will scrutinize the 'Exit Presser' for hints on how the transition will impact the 2026 easing cycle.

title: US GDP Q1 2026 (Advance Estimate)
desc: The first official look at growth during the tariff-implementation quarter. A reading below 1.2% would signal a 'Hard Landing' risk, likely forcing a dovish pivot despite inflation concerns. Critical for BTC's 'Recession Hedge' narrative.

title: CLARITY Act — Senate Markup Deadline
desc: Final window for the Senate Banking Committee to move the bill to the floor. Confirmation of a markup session would be the single largest regulatory 'Green Flag' in crypto history. Failure to move signals a delay until 2027.

title: US ISM Manufacturing PMI (April)
desc: First major manufacturing data for Q2. Investors are looking for signs of stagflation. A print below 48.0 would confirm industrial contraction, potentially weakening the Dollar (DXY) and providing a tailwind for BTC/ETH.

title: US Non-Farm Payrolls (April)
desc: The 'Jobs Report'. Market expects 145k new jobs. If unemployment ticks above 4.1%, expect an immediate repricing of June rate-cut probabilities. Extreme sensitivity expected for high-beta assets.

title: Post-Conference Network Difficulty Adjustment
desc: Following the Vegas summit, we expect a rebalancing of hash rate as new North American mining fleets come online. A positive adjustment will signal increasing network security and institutional miner confidence.
